title: Copper lodestones
description:
A minecraft datapack that changes the crafting recipe for lodestones to use a copper ingot instead of a netherite ingot.

Add_copper_lodestones is a variation that adds the new recipe while still being able to use a netherite ingot.
body:
A minecraft datapack that changes the crafting recipe for lodestones to use a copper ingot instead of a netherite ingot.

Add_copper_lodestones is a variation that adds the new recipe while still being able to use a netherite ingot.

### Wont update since 1.21.5 changed the recipe to iron.
